MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-23-2011 IN 206, DEFENDANT DEREK ROLLINSON AND MAR-LI ROLLINGSON'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS HELD. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL TO PROVIDING PROOF SATISFACTORY TO THE COURT THAT MR. DEREK ROLLINSON HAS A MEDICAL CONDITION THAT MAKES HIM UNABLE TO BE AT TRIAL. THE DOCTORS DECLARATIONS WERE NOT CONSIDERED BY THE COURT. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/27/11 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 AND THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF 6/23/11 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 514 ARE MAINTAINED. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
